titleStmt.title: SII 35.47: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 47. (A.R. No. 80 of 1950-51.) MŪḌŪR, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Hero-stone lying near the Barmadēva temple Stone No. 5.

This worn out inscription in the reign of Tribhuvanamalla contains a eulogy of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Singarasa and refers to the rule of Mahāmaṇḍalēsvara (name not specified) of the Kadamba family over Banavāsi-12000. Mentions Kammāra Chāvuṇḍa. The record was written by Bālachandra-paṇḍita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprathvīvallabhaṁ mahārājā
dhirājaṁ paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayaku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyabharaṇaṁ śrīmatutribhuvanamalla
dēvara rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamā
candrārkasthāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyuttamire tatpāda padmōpa
jīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara paramamahēśvara dēvadvijagurupā
dārādhakaṁ paramaṇḍaḷasādhakaṁnubhayabaḷācāryya maṁdaramahidhara dhairyyadānavi
nōdaṁnīśvaralabdavaraprasādaṁ gajārōhaṇabhagadattaṁ vairisāmantanansāna kīrtitāntanaṇnanēka sa
sarisu ṭasiraṁ tari suṇaragaṇḍamaṇḍaḷikamārtaṇḍa co kaṭiramaṇḍaḷikaraṁjaranakuṁjara
saraṇāgatavajrapaṁjaraṁ pusivaṇya dahadinoḷaṁba biṭṭadēvana kaṭṭidalagu śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷē
śvara siṁgarasar . baḍagaṇa mūḍaṇa teṁkaṇa paḍuvaṇa vārddhigaḷe mēreyinitējasōma
paḍasi ripurāyara kīrtti dē sakaḷavasu maḍimā
śrī svasti samastabhuvanāśraya mānalōkavikhyāta kadaṁbakuḷānvaya śrī mahīvalaya
ja rājarā paramēśvaraṁ vīramahēśvaraṁ vikramābharaṇaṁ jayalakṣmīramaṇaṁ śaraṇāga
tarakṣāmaṇi kādaṁbacūḍamaṇi kadanatriṇētra kṣatriyapavitrasaṁpanna
diṁ matigaḷa kēsarinaṇnaṁnaṁkakāṟa haracaraṇapādapaṁkajabhramaraṁ Ene nega
ḻda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara banavāsipanniccāsiramumaṁ sukasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājya
geyyuttamire pānuṁgalainūṟada Eḍeyūḷaleppattaṟabaḷiya
gāvuṇḍageyye svasti śrī
Ādityavāradaṁdu śānta
nu tekammāṟa cāvuṇḍa
dado gekoḍegeyapāda
sa pe niṟuyasiṭṭi
lalesiṟujīyā

śrīma
tu bā
ḷa ca
ndra pa
ṇḍitara
bareha
besa
geyda
bina
ba sa

jakō
ja ma
saṇō
Ā
dāsō
ja ma
lines are wornout
kradi
kka
Digital edition of SII 35.47 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
